ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plasmids" (
  "plasmid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plasmid */,
  "plasmid_type" TEXT /* Type of the plasmid */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Species ID of the gene(s)/insert */,
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* Vector ID */,
  "cloning_method_id" INTEGER /* Cloning method ID */,
  "cloning_site_destroyed" TEXT /* Indication if the cloning site was destroyed */,
  "bacterial_resistance_id" INTEGER /* Bacterial resistance ID */,
  "selectable_marker_id" INTEGER /* Selectable marker ID */,
  "copy_number" TEXT /* Copy number of the plasmid */,
  "growth_temp" TEXT /* Temperature for optimal growth */,
  "growth_strain" TEXT /* Bacterial strain used for growth */,
  "hazardous" TEXT /* Indication if the plasmid is hazardous */,
  "patents_or_licenses" TEXT /* Patents or licenses associated with the plasmid */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who created the plasmid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the plasmid was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who last modified the plasmid */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the plasmid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the plasmid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plasmid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasmids_vector_id FOREIGN KEY ("vector_id") REFERENCES vectors ("vector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasmids_bacterial_resistance_id FOREIGN KEY ("bacterial_resistance_id") REFERENCES bacterial_resistances ("resistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasmids_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasmids_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasmids_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasmids_cloning_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("cloning_method_id") REFERENCES cloning_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasmids_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasmids_selectable_marker_id FOREIGN KEY ("selectable_marker_id") REFERENCES selectable_markers ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "taxonomy" TEXT /* Taxonomy of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the species */,
  "endangered_status" TEXT /* Endangered status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vectors" (
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vector */,
  "vector_type" TEXT /* Type of the vector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vector */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility of the vector with different species */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the vector (e.g., synthetic, natural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloning_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloning method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloning method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cloning method */,
  "efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of the cloning method */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or citations for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bacterial_resistances" (
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bacterial resistance */,
  "resistance_name" TEXT /* Name of the bacterial resistance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bacterial resistance */,
  "spectrum" TEXT /* Spectrum of resistance */,
  "mechanism" TEXT /* Mechanism of resistance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resistance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selectable_markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selectable marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the selectable marker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selectable marker */,
  "sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity of the marker */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on how to use the marker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patents_licenses" (
  "patent_license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent or license */,
  "plasmid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plasmid associated with the patent or license */,
  "cloning_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloning method associated with the patent or license */,
  "patent_number" TEXT /* Patent number */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the patent or license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the patent or license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patent or license */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patent or license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_licenses_plasmid_id FOREIGN KEY ("plasmid_id") REFERENCES plasmids ("plasmid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_licenses_cloning_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("cloning_method_id") REFERENCES cloning_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazards" (
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazard */,
  "plasmid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plasmid associated with the hazard */,
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vector associated with the hazard */,
  "hazard_type" TEXT /* Type of hazard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hazard */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the hazard */,
  "safety_precautions" TEXT /* Safety precautions to be taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazards_plasmid_id FOREIGN KEY ("plasmid_id") REFERENCES plasmids ("plasmid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazards_vector_id FOREIGN KEY ("vector_id") REFERENCES vectors ("vector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_roles" (
  "role_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_roles_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
